overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in a green robe and red hair exploring a dimly lit gothic castle corridor adorned with tapestries and framed paintings. The character encounters translucent ghostly figures, continues through a large wooden door, and ascends a stone spiral staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with tapestries and framed portraits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor observing the wall decorations and paintings

entered.detail: repeating stone archways forming the vaulted ceiling of the corridor
large wall hanging with tree and flower motifs covering the stone walls
cluster of ornate framed paintings hanging on the corridor walls
medieval-style iron lanterns mounted on the walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor with vaulted stone ceilings. The walls are adorned with floral tapestries and framed portraits, illuminated by warm iron wall sconces. The atmosphere is quiet and the corridor appears empty.

events.description: two translucent ghostly figures appear standing in the corridor ahead
character walks directly through the translucent ghostly figures

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the translucent ghostly figures in the corridor

notable_agents.action: two translucent ghosts standing in the corridor, gesturing as the character approaches

segments.scene_description: As the character continues down the corridor, two translucent ghostly figures appear in the distance. The character walks through them without stopping. The corridor remains narrow with tapestries and wall sconces visible on alternating sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor end with large wooden door

events.description: character opens the large wooden door and enters the antechamber beyond

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the corridor and opening the large wooden door to enter the room beyond

entered.detail: large dark wooden door with metal studs at the end of the corridor
full suit of medieval armor standing on display beside the door
red carpet runner leading up to the wooden door
stone staircase visible through the open door leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor where a large ornate wooden door stands flanked by a suit of armor. After opening the door, the character enters a small antechamber with a red carpet and a stone spiral staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase and upper corridor

events.description: character begins ascending the stone spiral staircase
character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral stone staircase to reach the upper level of the castle

entered.detail: stone archway at the top of the stairs leading to the upper corridor
wooden bench positioned against the wall in the upper corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the narrow stone spiral staircase, the walls curving around as they climb. Upon reaching the top, the character exits the stairwell through a stone archway into an upper corridor featuring a wooden bench and continuing the gothic architectural style.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet gothic corridor that shifts from a state of solitude to a supernatural encounter. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow hallway defined by vaulted stone ceilings and walls adorned with floral tapestries and framed portraits. As the character advances, the warm glow of iron wall sconces illuminates the path, maintaining a sense of stillness. The scene then transforms as two translucent ghostly figures materialize in the distance, though the character continues forward without hesitation. The camera persists in its steady glide, passing through the spirits while the alternating patterns of tapestries and sconces recede into the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit gothic corridor through a transitional stairwell and into an upper gallery. It begins as the character approaches a large ornate wooden door flanked by a suit of armor, passing through the threshold into a small antechamber with a red carpet. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the character ascending a narrow stone spiral staircase, with the curved walls revolving around the viewer during the climb. Upon reaching the summit, the camera glides through a stone archway to reveal an upper corridor featuring a wooden bench and continuing the castle's gothic architectural style.
